22 ANTH - Anthropology

ANTH298E Approaches to Sustainable Development (3 Credits)

An overview of the history of sustainable development, major development and environmental theories, and development strategies as they relate to an anthropological concern for an integrated, holistic, comparative, and humane approach to sustainable development. Jointly offered with: ANTH657.

Credit Only Granted for. ANTH357 or ANTH657.
